positive: A cozy, whimsical portrait of a sloth napping on a pile of oversized books, surrounded by warm sunlight streaming through a window. Studio Ghibli inspired watercolor style, soft pastel tones, delicate texture, comforting atmosphere, golden hour lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, high contrast, harsh edges
